mentions.note: Up mid-20s to mid-high 50s; delivered double-digit adjusted EBITDA growth despite tariff costs; near 52-week high so hold position but don't add.

Terrific long-term compounder; 13% revenue CAGR, 28% EBITDA CAGR, 25% EPS CAGR; recent 20% pullback to $48 unrelated to fundamentals; 32x forward earnings justified by 30% growth; dominant coconut water category leadership globally.
